name: Power Wash Cleanup
author: Poki
description: Are you ready to release some pressure? Then hop on Power Wash Cleanup! In this relaxing simulator game you can wash away the dirt and grime from various fun objects such as a space rocket, an ice-cream truck or a spooky coffin. What's more, if you're looking to increase your power you can temporarily boost your tool's performance to insane levels! Don't delay, grab your power tools and get to spraying! How do I play Power Wash Cleanup? Use the mouse to aim, then click to clean the surfaces! Who created Power Wash Cleanup? Power Wash Cleanup is created by CAMU. Play their other game on Poki: Fox Island Builder ! How can I play Power Wash Cleanup for free? You can play Power Wash Cleanup for free on Poki. Can I play Power Wash Cleanup on mobile devices and desktop? Power Wash Cleanup can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
